description: Handler infrastructure — command routing, extension registries, LLM/tool execution workers, outbox projectors, event dispatching, step dispatch, locking, idempotency, replay, tool batch collection, bounded parallel dispatch, and idempotency result store.

files.responsibility: Routes ApplyCommand to core/extension/rejected — validates prefix, options, cancel-safe support.
Registry of CommandHandlerInterface — finds handler by command kind.
Registry of EventSubscriberInterface — yields subscribers matching an event type.
Dispatches boundary hooks via Symfony EventDispatcher + HookSubscriberRegistry. Validates hook names.
Registry of HookSubscriberInterface — yields subscribers matching a hook name.
Messenger handler (agent.execution.bus) — invokes Platform, normalizes response, dispatches LlmStepResult to command bus.

Messenger handler (agent.execution.bus) — hydrates enriched ToolCall VO with mode/timeout/assistantMessage/argSchema/cancelToken context from ExecuteToolCall, invokes ToolExecutorInterface, dispatches ToolCallResult to command bus.

Full tool execution engine (Stage 06) — resolves execution policy, checks idempotency result store, validates args, runs before/after hooks, executes via Symfony Toolbox or interrupt fallback, enforces timeout, stamps results with execution metadata.
Resolves ToolExecutionPolicy per tool name — applies per-tool overrides on top of global defaults for mode, timeout, and maxParallelism.
In-memory idempotency store for tool results — keyed by (runId, toolCallId) and (toolName, idempotencyKey) for dedup and replay protection.
Aggregates ToolCatalogProviderInterface providers, deduplicates by name, enforces schema stability across turns.

Bounded parallel dispatch — registers expected tool call batch, gates dispatch by maxParallelism and Sequential/Interrupt mode, collects results, returns ordered complete batches with further dispatchable effects.
Outcome of batch collection — rejected/duplicate/acceptedPending(effects)/acceptedComplete(orderedResults,effects) factory methods. Carries further dispatchable ExecuteToolCall effects.
Projects events to JSONL + Mercure outbox sinks, then runs both projectors inline.
Messenger handler (agent.publisher.bus) — claims JSONL outbox entries, appends to RunLogWriter, marks processed/failed.
Messenger handler (agent.publisher.bus) — claims Mercure outbox entries, publishes via RunEventPublisher, marks processed/failed.
Dispatches RunEvent via Symfony EventDispatcher + EventSubscriberRegistry.
Dispatches effect commands to execution bus and publisher messages to publisher bus.
Per-run mutual exclusion using Symfony Lock — synchronized() wraps a callable with acquire/release.
In-memory idempotency tracker — wasHandled/markHandled scoped by (scope, runId, idempotencyKey).
Rebuilds hot prompt state from canonical events (fallback to JSONL). Verifies sequence integrity, estimates tokens, saves to PromptStateStore.
